reviews.school_name: Grads International School - Cassia Estate,Eta I

reviews.author: Kapil Soni
reviews.review_body: My kid needs special attention due to a severe medical condition. The staff, Principal and the management has given us tremendous support. God bless everyone.

reviews.school_name: Grads International School - Cassia Estate,Eta I
reviews.author: Sardar Patel
reviews.review_body: I am proud to be the Principal of Grads International School where we have cleanest campus, cleanest toilets, cleanest school building with excellent pedagogy, stress-free and joyful learning as suggested by NEP 2020. Here at Grads teachers are well educated and compassionate.  With experience of 32 years with 6 branded and reputed schools in different states of India, I really feel blessed to be the custodian of this school. God bless every member of Grads International School family.

reviews.school_name: Grads International School - Cassia Estate,Eta I
reviews.author: Archana T
reviews.review_body: At Grads International School, children can explore their creativity, thinking & imagination through fun & interactive activities which help them to relate & link to the world around them. A place where children can inculcate values & skills at the tender age of their life. Loving and caring environment in this school. Teachers are giving individual attention to every child...👍

reviews.school_name: Grads International School - Cassia Estate,Eta I
reviews.author: Udit Sharma
reviews.review_body: HIGHLY RECOMMEND THIS SCHOOL! The staff of teachers is one of the best (if not the best) in the area. The care and attention they give to our students is by far exceeds any of our expectations. And if that wasn't enough, students out-perform any of the children in their age group.  Thank you Grads international school  , future of our nàtion will always be ahead because of you.

reviews.school_name: Grads International School - Cassia Estate,Eta I
reviews.author: Charu Kakar
reviews.review_body: At Grads International School, children are nurtured with love and care, here they have been given the platform to showcase their talent individually . They not only enjoy their extra curricular activities but always keen to learn their interesting classroom sessions which enhances their skills and knowledge.
